overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing protagonist Aloy walking through a lush overgrown landscape. The scene transitions from a misty overcast forest to warm golden hour lighting as she approaches and passes beneath a massive mechanical Tallneck structure.

events.description: character exits covered wooden archway into open misty field
character steps from wooden platform onto dirt forest trail

agents.ego_description: Aloy walks away from the wooden settlement structure onto a winding dirt path through the forest

entered.detail: organic curved wooden structure with hanging vines serving as settlement entrance
illuminated white lantern hanging from the archway
winding dirt trail leading into the misty forest
massive mechanical walking structure visible in the distant haze
tall thin evergreen trees surrounding the path

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a wooden settlement archway with a glowing lantern. Aloy walks forward, exiting the sheltered area into an open misty field. She transitions from wooden planks to a dirt path, with the massive Tallneck structure visible far in the distance through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest meadow with dirt trail

agents.ego_description: Aloy continues walking steadily along the dirt path through grassy fields, gradually approaching the distant mechanical structure

entered.detail: expansive fields of tall green grass and wildflowers
patches of distinctive red foliage on the hillside
clusters of purple wildflowers beside the path

segments.scene_description: Walking through the open meadow under overcast skies, Aloy progresses along the dirt trail. The Tallneck structure grows larger in the mid-distance as she approaches. The landscape features scattered pine trees, red vegetation on the hillsides, and patches of purple wildflowers along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit meadow approaching massive mechanical Tallneck

events.description: sun breaks through clouds creating warm golden hour lighting across the landscape
character arrives at the base of the Tallneck and walks beneath its massive structure

agents.ego_description: Aloy approaches the Tallneck as the environment transforms to golden hour lighting, then walks beneath the towering mechanical legs and undercarriage

entered.detail: warm orange and pink sunset clouds illuminating the scene
massive golden mechanical limbs supporting the structure
wooden plank pathway leading under the Tallneck
complex mechanical underbelly with hexagonal lattice patterns and hanging vegetation

segments.scene_description: The lighting shifts dramatically to golden hour as Aloy continues toward the Tallneck. The massive mechanical structure dominates the view with its intricate golden legs and hexagonal undercarriage. She walks onto a wooden platform beneath the structure, passing under its towering form as the warm sunset light bathes the entire scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered wooden settlement into a vast, open landscape that culminates beneath a towering mechanical structure. It begins under a wooden archway illuminated by a glowing lantern, moving forward as Aloy exits the shelter and transitions from planks to a dirt path within a misty field. As she progresses through the open meadow under overcast skies, the distant Tallneck grows larger in the mid-distance, surrounded by scattered pine trees, red hillside vegetation, and purple wildflowers. The lighting then shifts dramatically to a warm golden hour as the massive mechanical structure begins to dominate the view with its intricate legs and hexagonal undercarriage. Finally, the camera follows her onto a wooden platform, passing directly under the towering form of the Tallneck as the sunset light bathes the entire scene.
